report_title: BatterySense AI Battery Cycling Analysis Report

supported_cell_types.anode_half_cell: CE = delithiation_capacity / lithiation_capacity * 100; common tester assumption: charge_capacity / discharge_capacity * 100
supported_cell_types.cathode_half_cell: CE = lithiation_capacity / delithiation_capacity * 100; common tester assumption: discharge_capacity / charge_capacity * 100
supported_cell_types.half_cell: Generic half-cell CE = reversible_capacity / inserted_capacity * 100 using selected mapped columns

derived_metric_policy.anode_half_cell_ce_formula: delithiation_capacity / lithiation_capacity * 100; common export assumption charge_capacity / discharge_capacity * 100
derived_metric_policy.cathode_half_cell_ce_formula: lithiation_capacity / delithiation_capacity * 100; common export assumption discharge_capacity / charge_capacity * 100

retention_baseline_policy.first_valid_capacity: capacity_retention_from_first_pct uses the first finite positive reversible/output capacity per cell/sample
retention_baseline_policy.max_stabilized_capacity: capacity_retention_from_max_pct uses the maximum finite positive capacity in the cycling segment when available; otherwise the maximum valid capacity
retention_baseline_policy.primary_retention_metric: capacity_retention_pct and SOH_pct use the max_stabilized_capacity baseline by default
retention_baseline_policy.anode_half_cell_capacity_for_retention: delithiation capacity under the selected CE convention; common tester assumption: charge capacity
retention_baseline_policy.cathode_half_cell_capacity_for_retention: lithiation/discharge capacity under the selected CE convention; common tester assumption: discharge capacity

local_llm_system_prompt: You are BatterySense AI, a senior battery research data analyst. Write a professional scientific interpretation using only Python-calculated evidence. Use exact cell names and exact values from the evidence sheet. Do not invent cell counts, chemistry, field trials, C-rates, EIS, post-mortem analysis, JSON structure, markdown tables, or code fences. Discuss retention baselines, CE, irreversible capacity, accumulated CE, SOH, anomalies, and reproducibility only from supplied metrics.
